acceptance_targets: [chapter_09_craft_elliptical_clipping] Pass if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:95, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:207, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:215, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:319 reads as complete narration without dropped subjects or one-word narrative fragments; fail if any of those emphasis beats still rely on clipped narration to do the work.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:95, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:207, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:215, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:319 reads as complete narration without dropped subjects or one-word narrative fragments; fail if any of those emphasis beats still rely on clipped narration to do the work.
findings.evidence: Narration repeatedly uses clipped, subject-dropped emphasis at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:95, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:207, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:215, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:319 (for example: "Not the stew itself.", "Just enough to feel heat.", "Crowded.", "Technical.", "Not startled.", "Not relief.").
findings.problem: This chapter leans on elliptical clipping in narration even though the constitution explicitly forbids subject-dropping prose. Because the fragments recur across both scenes, the effect stops reading as pressure-specific compression and starts reading as a default line-making shortcut, which weakens sentence authority in an otherwise controlled chapter.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the emphatic narration anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:95, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:141, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:207, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:211, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:215, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:255, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_09.md:319 into grammatically complete sentences. Keep the compression, but land emphasis through full syntax, sensory residue, or clause-level contrast instead of isolated fragments.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
